overall.description: First-person walking sequence along the sidewalk of a brightly lit urban casino district at night. The camera moves steadily past the Diamond Casino building with its distinctive green and red neon lighting while vehicles occasionally pass on the adjacent multi-lane street. Game engine footage from GTA V with wet reflective pavement and atmospheric neon illumination.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a wet sidewalk at night, bordered by the Diamond Casino's distinctive green and red neon-lit wall on the right. A dark sedan passes by on the multi-lane street to the left, while the camera maintains a steady walking pace forward.

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along the casino wall with the green neon lights reflecting off the wet pavement. A yellow taxi passes by on the street to the left as the camera approaches and passes a tall street lamp, with the background buildings becoming occluded by the lamp post.

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, a black sports car passes by on the left as the camera walks past the street lamp. The casino entrance becomes visible in the distance ahead, while the green neon wall continues along the right side, now appearing further away as the perspective shifts toward the entrance area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a rain-slicked urban sidewalk that leads from a neon-lit perimeter wall toward a distant casino entrance. It begins beside the Diamond Casino's distinctive green and red neon wall, moving forward as a dark sedan passes on the adjacent multi-lane street. As the walk continues, the green neon light reflects vividly off the wet pavement while a yellow taxi glides by and the camera passes a tall street lamp that momentarily occludes the background buildings. The scene then opens up as a black sports car passes on the left, shifting the perspective away from the wall and toward the glowing casino entrance appearing in the distance.
